# CWE-547 positive: HMAC signing secret hard-coded in source (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-547-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"net/http"
)

const sessionMACKey = "super-secret-not-rotated"

func IssueSessionCookie(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	uid := r.Header.Get("X-UID")
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(sessionMACKey))
	mac.Write([]byte(uid))
	token := hex.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{Name: "session", Value: token})
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
